title: Sniffed Credentials
description:
A SOC team suspects credentials were exposed in cleartext on an internal segment with HTTPS misconfiguration.

Download the case pack and investigate multi-source network telemetry (PCAP, Zeek conn/http logs, Suricata EVE JSON, proxy logs, threat-intel context, and analyst handoff notes).

Expect realistic noise and false positives. Identify the *primary* CIA pillar violated.

Flag Format
CTF{pillar}
